headline: CompetitorAlpha launched AI-powered PRD generation — directly overlaps with ProductOS V10 core capability
description: CompetitorAlpha announced 'AI-Powered PRD Generation' as a new product feature. The feature ingests user research, competitor analysis, and strategy documents to auto-generate complete PRDs with user stories. This directly overlaps with ProductOS V10's planned PRD generation pipeline. Competitive urgency: high. ProductOS V10's differentiation lies in gold-standard validation, maturity-band-aware PRDs, and prototype-to-PRD traceability — but we must accelerate delivery to maintain lead.

competitive_impact.strategic_significance: Direct overlap with ProductOS V10 core capability. CompetitorAlpha has larger user base (10x estimated). If their PRD generation reaches parity with our planned quality, they capture the awareness before we launch.
competitive_impact.impact_summary: ProductOS V10's PRD pipeline must ship with measurable differentiation: gold-standard validation, maturity-band awareness, prototype traceability, and non-functional requirement extraction. These are not in CompetitorAlpha's v1 feature based on their blog post. We have a 4-6 week differentiation window.

affected_artifacts.impact_description: Strategic context section needs competitive update. Differentiation claims must reference CompetitorAlpha gap analysis.
Add new PRD Generation capability row. Score CompetitorAlpha. Update differentiation summary.
Add objection handling for 'CompetitorAlpha already has PRD generation'. Include gap analysis comparing their v1 vs our V10 pipeline.

recommended_pm_action: 1) Refresh competitive feature matrix immediately to add PRD generation capability comparison. 2) Update ProductOS V10 PRD strategic context to reference competitive move and articulate differentiation. 3) Evaluate acceleration of PRD pipeline sprint (currently scheduled Sprint 14-15) to maintain 4-6 week lead. 4) Brief leadership on competitive shift and differentiation strategy.
